description: Characters involved in governance and diplomacy in fantasy settings.
characters: Steward
A trusted keeper who manages lands and resources in another's name.
Ambassador
A silver-tongued diplomat who speaks for their realm in foreign courts.
Duke
A powerful noble who rules a duchy with authority.
Duchess
A powerful noble who governs a duchy with command.
Baron
A titled landholder who oversees a rural domain.
Baroness
A titled noble who rules her barony with firm hand.
Lord
A noble of rank and influence in the feudal order.
Lady
A noble of standing and influence in the feudal order.
Regent
A temporary ruler standing in for an absent monarch.
Page
A young noble-in-training serving at court.
